probes.label: Stateless first-turn — the failing transcript verbatim (D2-binding bug-fix proof)
probes.userMessage: Extract the key AP invoice header fields from this DAEJOO invoice: supplier name, invoice number, PO number, invoice date, total amount, currency, tax amount, and supplier branch if available.
probes.expectedNotes: schema with 8-9 fields; extractionSystemPrompt non-empty; no D2-forbidden phrases in chat output
probes.chatVisibleExcerpt: You are an intelligent document processing system specializing in commercial invoice data extraction. Your task is to extract accounts payable header fields from the provided DAEJOO commercial invoice

probes.label: Stateful follow-up — "add tax amount and currency to the extraction" → recompile
probes.userMessage: add tax amount and currency to the extraction
probes.expectedNotes: schema includes the new fields; extractionSystemPrompt regenerated
probes.chatVisibleExcerpt: You are an intelligent document processing system specializing in commercial invoice data extraction. Your task is to extract accounts payable header fields from the provided DAEJOO commercial invoice

probes.label: Capability classification — "link to S/4 HANA"
probes.userMessage: can you link this to S/4 HANA?
probes.expectedNotes: confirmationQuestion / capabilityGapDescription / capabilitySurfaceCitation / pendingSignalDescription all non-empty; citation references a section of docs/document-ai-capability-surface.md

payloadShape.capabilitySurfaceCitation: Integration Boundaries & Consumption Patterns, Service Plans (p. 10-22) and Enrichment & Downstream Consumption (p. 45-50) of docs/document-ai-capability-surface.md

probes.capabilitySurfaceCitation: Integration Boundaries & Consumption Patterns, Service Plans (p. 10-22) and Enrichment & Downstream Consumption (p. 45-50) of docs/document-ai-capability-surface.md
probes.chatVisibleExcerpt: Linking extracted invoice data to SAP S/4HANA involves integration capabilities beyond what Document AI's core extraction service provides directly. Document AI extracts and structures data from docum

probes.label: Show-me-the-prompt turn — "show me the prompt"
probes.expectedAction: clarify OR a route-side prompt_display turn (either acceptable in v1; document which the merged agent emits)
probes.chatVisibleExcerpt: Would you like me to show you the extraction system prompt I generated for the previous configuration, or would you like to modify the field list and see an updated prompt?
probes.promptDisplayTurnEmitted: route-side (v1 route renders prompt_display from the stored extractionSystemPrompt regardless of decision.action)

bucket.justification: All 4 probes returned the expected action shapes (or the defensible alternative for Probe D), and no D2-forbidden phrase appeared in any chat-visible output.
